tabs.tasks.label: Tasks
settings.plan.enabled.label: Plan Mode
settings.plan.enabled.description: Enable plan mode for read-only exploration and planning before execution
settings.plan.defaultOnStartup.label: Start in Plan Mode
settings.plan.defaultOnStartup.descripti: Automatically enter plan mode at the start of every new session
settings.goal.enabled.label: Goal Mode
settings.goal.enabled.description: Enable per-session goal mode and the hidden goal tool
settings.goal.statusInFooter.label: Goal Status in Footer
settings.goal.statusInFooter.description: Show token budget alongside the goal indicator in the status line
settings.goal.continuationModes.label: Goal Continuation Modes
settings.goal.continuationModes.descript: Run modes where active goals may auto-continue between turns
settings.task.isolation.mode.label: Isolation Mode
settings.task.isolation.mode.options.aut: Let the PAL pick the best available backend
settings.task.isolation.mode.options.rco: git worktree if available, otherwise recursive copy
settings.task.isolation.merge.label: Isolation Merge Strategy
settings.task.isolation.merge.descriptio: How isolated task changes are integrated (patch apply or branch merge)
settings.task.isolation.commits.label: Isolation Commit Style
settings.task.isolation.commits.descript: Commit message style for nested repo changes (generic or AI-generated)
settings.worktree.base.label: Worktree Base Directory
settings.worktree.base.description: Base directory for agent-managed worktrees — task-isolation copies, `github` PR checkouts, and `omp worktree` cleanup all live here. Unset uses ~/.omp/wt. Must be an absolute or ~-relative path; relative paths are ignored. The OMP_WORKTREE_DIR env var overrides this.
settings.task.eager.label: Prefer Task Delegation
settings.task.eager.description: How strongly to push delegating work to subagents
settings.task.eager.options.preferred.de: Adds delegation guidance to the system prompt
settings.task.eager.options.always.label: Always
settings.task.eager.options.always.descr: Prompt guidance plus a first-turn delegation reminder
settings.task.batch.label: Batch Task Calls
settings.task.batch.description: Switch the task tool to its batch shape: one call carries { agent, context, tasks[] } — one subagent per item (with per-item isolation) and a required shared context prepended to every assignment. With async.enabled=true, each spawn runs as an independent background agent with the normal idle/parked lifecycle; otherwise the call blocks for merged results. Disable to restore the flat single-spawn schema.
settings.task.maxConcurrency.label: Max Concurrent Tasks
settings.task.maxConcurrency.description: Maximum number of subagents running concurrently
settings.task.enableLsp.label: LSP in Subagents
settings.task.enableLsp.description: Allow subagents spawned via the task tool to use the lsp tool. Off by default to keep subagents cheap; enable when LSP-aware delegation is worth the extra tokens.
settings.task.maxRecursionDepth.label: Max Task Recursion
settings.task.maxRecursionDepth.descript: How many levels deep subagents can spawn their own subagents
settings.task.maxRuntimeMs.label: Max Subagent Runtime
settings.task.maxRuntimeMs.description: Hard wall-clock limit per subagent (ms). 0 disables it. Defense-in-depth against provider-side stream hangs that escape the inference-layer watchdog; triggers a normal subagent abort with a 'timed out' reason.
settings.task.agentIdleTtlMs.label: Agent Idle TTL
settings.task.agentIdleTtlMs.description: How long an idle subagent stays live in memory before being parked to disk (ms). Parked agents are revived automatically when messaged or resumed. 0 keeps idle agents live until exit.
settings.task.softRequestBudget.label: Soft Subagent Request Budget
settings.task.softRequestBudget.descript: Soft per-subagent request budget (assistant requests per run). Crossing it injects one steering notice asking the subagent to wrap up; at 1.5x the budget the run is aborted gracefully, salvaging partial output. 0 disables the guard. Bundled explore/quick_task agents use a lower built-in budget.
settings.commands.enableClaudeUser.label: Claude User Commands
